description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a black grip tape surface on the top and a natural wood finish visible along the sides. The deck is slightly concave with upturned nose and tail, designed for tricks and maneuverability. It is supported by two metal trucks, each mounted with a pair of white, classic-style wheels. The wheels are small and hard, suitable for street skating, and the trucks are of a standard profile with no visible branding. The grip tape covers the entire top surface and appears to be a solid black color without any cutouts or graphics. There are no visible brand logos or deck graphics, giving the skateboard a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip tape deck, natural wood sides, white classic wheels, and standard metal trucks. The design is plain with no visible logos or graphics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, the concave deck, upturned nose and tail, and both sets of white wheels.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the width of the deck, the black grip tape, and the rounded nose or tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the skateboard's profile, deck curvature, and wheels.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, showing the width and curvature of the deck and the black grip tape.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard profile, silver color, top-mount, no visible branding
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern or graphics
